Package org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql.generator

@NullMarked package org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql.generator
CQL generators for Keyspace object actions.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql
    CQL core support.
    org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql.converter
    CQL specific converters.
    org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql.keyspace
    Keyspace object action specifications such as CREATE TABLE, DROP INDEX.
    org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql.session
    Provides utility classes for simple CqlSession access and various session implementations.
    org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql.util
    Utility classes for basic CQL interaction.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AddColumnCqlGenerator
    CQL generator for generating an ADD clause of an ALTER TABLE statement.
    AlterColumnCqlGenerator
    CQL generator for generating an ALTER column clause of an ALTER TABLE statement.
    AlterKeyspaceCqlGenerator
    CQL generator for generating ALTER TABLE statements.
    AlterTableCqlGenerator
    CQL generator for generating ALTER TABLE statements.
    AlterUserTypeCqlGenerator
    CQL generator for generating ALTER TYPE statements.
    ColumnChangeCqlGenerator<T extends ColumnChangeSpecification>
    Base class for column change CQL generators.
    CqlGenerator
    Entrypoint for CQL generation of CqlSpecification objects representing DML statements such as table creations or keyspace drops.
    CreateIndexCqlGenerator
    CQL generator for generating a CREATE INDEX statement.
    CreateKeyspaceCqlGenerator
    CQL generator for generating a CREATE TABLE statement.
    CreateTableCqlGenerator
    CQL generator for generating a CREATE TABLE statement.
    CreateUserTypeCqlGenerator
    CQL generator for generating a CREATE TYPE statement.
    DropColumnCqlGenerator
    CQL generator for generating a DROP column clause of an ALTER TABLE statement.
    DropIndexCqlGenerator
    CQL generator for generating a DROP INDEX statement.
    DropKeyspaceCqlGenerator
    CQL generator for generating a DROP TABLE statement.
    DropTableCqlGenerator
    CQL generator for generating a DROP TABLE statement.
    DropUserTypeCqlGenerator
    CQL generator for generating a DROP TYPE statement.
    IndexNameCqlGenerator<T extends IndexNameSpecification<T>>
    Base class for Index CQL generators.
    KeyspaceNameCqlGenerator<T extends KeyspaceActionSpecification>
    Base class for Keyspace CQL generators.
    KeyspaceOptionsCqlGenerator<T extends KeyspaceOptionsSpecification<T>>
    Base class that contains behavior common to CQL generation for table operations.
    RenameColumnCqlGenerator
    CQL generator for generating an RENAME column clause of an ALTER TABLE statement.
    TableNameCqlGenerator<T extends TableNameSpecification>
    Base class for Table CQL generators.
    TableOptionsCqlGenerator<T extends TableOptionsSpecification<T>>
    Base class that contains behavior common to CQL generation for table operations.
    UserTypeNameCqlGenerator<T extends UserTypeNameSpecification>
    Abstract class to support User type CQL generation.
